auth.title: Sign in
auth.subtitle: Enter the password.
auth.loginFailed: Could not sign in. Try again.
queue.rabbitmqTooltipConnected:
RabbitMQ broker connection is active.
The worker can enqueue and process jobs.
queue.rabbitmqTooltipDisconnected:
RabbitMQ broker connection is inactive.
New jobs may not run until the broker is reachable again.
overview.range.12h: Hourly progress over the last 12 hours
overview.range.7d: Daily progress over the last 7 days
overview.heatmapLegendScaleHint: Colour uses a square-root scale so typical days are easier to tell apart.
overview.serverUptimeTooltip:
Time since the worker process started.
{{human}} · {{seconds}} s total
table.errorEmpty: No error details were recorded for this job.
artifactViewer.chunksEmpty: This artifact has no chunks in the list.
artifactViewer.chunksMissing: Valid JSON was found, but there is no chunks array to display. Use Raw to inspect the file.
artifactViewer.chunksUnavailableLarge: Chunk cards are not built for files over 1 MB. Use the Raw tab or Download.
artifactViewer.vectorsMissing: Valid JSON was found, but there is no embeddings array to display. Use Raw to inspect the file.
artifactViewer.vectorsUnavailableLarge: Vector cards are not built for files over 1 MB. Use the Raw tab or Download.
artifactViewer.invalidJsonNote: This response is not valid JSON; showing the raw text below.
artifactViewer.largeJsonRaw: This file is over 1 MB; showing unformatted JSON without syntax highlighting to keep the UI responsive.
artifactViewer.largeMarkdownRaw: Large markdown is shown as plain text without syntax highlighting for performance.
artifactViewer.largeMarkdownPreview: This file is too large to preview here. Use the Raw tab or Download to view it without blocking the UI.
artifactViewer.renderError: The viewer hit an unexpected error. Try Download or close and reopen.
about.description: DocRunr turns documents into clean Markdown and structured chunks for RAG pipelines. We kept it simple on purpose so you don't have to own the messy parts of document conversion.
upload.title: Upload documents
upload.workerAlert: Uploads are queued. If several workers are active, another worker may pick them up, so they won’t necessarily appear in this worker’s queue table.
upload.dropOrClick: Drag files here or click to choose.
upload.dropzoneAria: Drop files to upload or activate to choose files
upload.noFilesHint: Add one or more supported documents to queue them.
upload.llmProfileHint: Optionally select an embedding model to generate vectors after extraction.
upload.llmProfileLoadError: Could not load the configured embedding models from the LLM worker.
mode.label: Mode
mode.fixed: Worker mode is fixed to {{mode}}. Toggle disabled.
